input_question: Which colorectal trials had 3 or more arms and used multikinase inhibitor as control?
decomposed_queries: Which colorectal trials had 3 or more arms and used multikinase inhibitor as control?
top_candidate_question: Which trials have Control arm equal to Multikinase inhibitor?
top_candidate_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Trial name" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Control arm" = 'Multikinase inhibitor';
